name: logreducer
description: Reduce log files for AI consumption — strip noise, deduplicate, shorten IDs, fold stack traces

logreducer.stripAnsi.description: Remove ANSI color codes and control characters

logreducer.normalizeWhitespace.description: Collapse excessive blank lines and trim trailing spaces

logreducer.shortenIds.description: Replace UUIDs, hex strings, and long tokens with short placeholders

logreducer.shortenUrls.description: Strip query parameters and collapse long URL paths

logreducer.deduplicateLines.description: Collapse consecutive identical or near-identical lines

logreducer.detectCycles.description: Find repeating multi-line blocks and show once with count

logreducer.filterNoise.description: Remove DEBUG lines, health checks, heartbeat noise, and devtools artifacts

logreducer.stripSourceLocations.description: Strip browser console file:line prefixes when a [Tag] is present

logreducer.compressPrefix.description: Factor out repeated log line prefixes into a single header
